libraries.purpose: HTTP server, REST API, static UI when ENABLE_UI=true

libraries.purpose: Multipart upload for extraction CSV/PDF endpoints

libraries.name: openai
libraries.purpose: OpenAI SDK v3 — transaction classification and account matching

libraries.name: pdf-parse
libraries.purpose: Extract text from PDF credit-card statements

libraries.name: queue
libraries.purpose: Serial async job queue for webhook and batch categorization

libraries.purpose: Real-time job/batch progress events to public/index.html

libraries.name: uuid
libraries.purpose: Generate job and batch job IDs in JobList

runtime.purpose: Production deployment via parent Firefly stack or standalone-dev profile

services.name: firefly-iii
services.purpose: Source of transactions, categories, accounts; webhook trigger

tooling.name: its-magic
tooling.purpose: Cursor agent workflow, validation scripts, engineering docs

tooling.note: Not required for npm start; required for engineering gates

tooling.purpose: PID 1 signal handling in production Docker image
